team_name: Swadhikar — AI-Powered Legal Rights & Judgment Compliance Platform for Every Indian Citizen
summary: Build an AI system (Swadhikar) that extracts actionable items from court judgment PDFs, generates a citizen action plan with RTI templates, deadline countdowns, and escalation paths. The platform also includes a multilingual conversational AI for legal advice, scheme finder, and judgment compliance tracking.
constraints_addressed: Focus on decision support, not full automation
